preflight.description: Checks write access to user Preferences, runs a safe `defaults` write/delete smoke test, and warns if MDM profiles are present. No permanent changes are made.

list.description: Lists all preference domains, or keys within a specific domain.

inspect.description: Shows current values for preferences across all domains by default.

export.description: Exports macOS preferences to a JSON configuration file across all domains by default.

--domains.description: Comma-separated domains to include (defaults to all domains)

filter.description: Classifies every key in a config using deterministic guardrails (value-facts, name-pattern overrides, and an optional baseline diff) and writes a keep-only config (immediately apply-safe) plus a separate human-readable report of skip/review keys. No AI.

asides.content: Deterministic and batch — the AI-assisted interactive experience is reserved for the paid GUI (Macprefs Studio).

exitCodes.2: completed; one or more keys need review

--baseline.description: Optional baseline config for changed-from-default detection

--domains.description: Comma-separated domains to include (defaults to all in the input)

validate.description: Checks that a config file is valid JSON with correct structure.

plan.description: Shows what changes would be made without applying them. Read-only operation.

--verbose.description: Show full detailed list of all changes

apply.description: Applies config changes. Creates snapshot before any changes.

asides.content: Without `--yes`, apply prompts for confirmation before applying changes.

rollback.description: Restores preferences to their state before an apply operation.
